name: k8s-jupyter-local-agent
description: A VS Code sidebar agent that talks to a local Ollama instance from WSL.

localAgent.ollamaBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the Ollama server reachable from WSL.

localAgent.model.description: Default Ollama model used by the sidebar agent.

localAgent.systemPrompt.default: You are a practical local coding assistant working inside VS Code. Be concise, useful, and code-oriented.
localAgent.systemPrompt.description: Optional system prompt prepended to each Ollama chat request.

localAgent.includeWorkspaceContext.description: Attach a compact workspace snapshot including files and git status to each request.
